title: cerastium subtetrandrum
intro: Cerastium subtetrandrum, also known as the lesser mouse-ear chickweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cerastium subtetrandrum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and minor injuries. In herbal preparations, Cerastium subtetrandrum can be used as a topical cream or ointment, and it can also be consumed as a tea or tincture to promote overall well-being.
